description: Phase-8 inbound-email triage taxonomy (ADR-0015). Two stable, append-only global choice sets bound by cr1bd_inboundemail.cr1bd_category / cr1bd_subtype. Members mirror the deterministic classifier's returned string values 1:1 -- the `name` of each option EQUALS a CATEGORY_* / SUBTYPE_* constant in functions/parser/cedocumentmapper_v2/rules/email_classifier.py. NEVER renumber (same discipline as case-status.json / audit-event.json); add new members append-only at the next free integer.

choiceSets.description: Triage CATEGORY. Members EQUAL email_classifier.py CATEGORY_RECEIVING_WORK / CATEGORY_QUERY / CATEGORY_OTHER. receiving_work routes to the existing Case chain; query logs against an open Case (or none) and stops; other is the catch-all (spam/auto-replies/newsletters fall through here -- never silently dropped).

Triage SUBTYPE. Members EQUAL email_classifier.py SUBTYPE_EXISTING_PROVIDER_INSTRUCTION / SUBTYPE_EXISTING_PROVIDER_AUDIT / SUBTYPE_NEW_CLIENT_WORK / SUBTYPE_QUERY_EXISTING_WORK / SUBTYPE_QUERY_NEW_ENQUIRY / SUBTYPE_OTHER, mapping the operator's 4-quadrant taxonomy + the Other catch-all. existing_provider_audit is the inbound subtype for an audit re-inspection instruction (distinct from the cr1bd_auditevent action LOG and the ADR-0014 case-TYPE 'audit').
